invalidBlueskyHandle: Please enter a valid Bluesky handle
signInFailed: Sign in failed. Please check your handle and app password.
connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check your handle and app password.
appPasswordHelperText: Use an app password from your Bluesky account settings
needDifferentAccount: Need to connect a different account?
howToGetAppPassword: How to get your app password
appPasswordInstructions:
1. Go to Bluesky web app
2. Navigate to Settings → App Passwords
3. Create a new app password
4. Use that password here
welcomeSubtitle: Choose how you'd like to sign in to your AT Protocol account.
oauthChoiceSubtitle: We'll open your service in the browser. Recommended.
passwordChoiceSubtitle: Use a handle and an app password from your account settings.
oauthScreenSubtitle: Enter your handle and we'll connect you through your service in the browser.
passwordScreenSubtitle: Enter your handle and an app password from your AT Protocol account.
oauthSuccessMessage: @{{handle}} ({{did}}) authenticated via atproto OAuth. Wiring this session into the API client is the next step.
guestRequiredSubtitle: Sign in to use this feature on Akari.
signupChoiceSubtitle: Sign up on Bluesky or Blacksky in the app.
signupScreenSubtitle: Pick a service and we'll set up a new AT Protocol account for you.
signupHandleHelper: We'll add the service's domain to your handle.
signupFailedGeneric: Could not create your account. Please try again.
signupInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signupPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signupHandleTooShort: Handle must be at least 3 characters.
signupHandleInvalid: Handle can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes.
signupCustomPdsUrlHelper: The base URL of the PDS that will host your account.
signupCustomHandleHelper: Enter your full handle, including its domain.
signupCustomInvalidPdsUrl: Enter a valid PDS URL beginning with https://.
signupCustomInvalidHandle: Handle must be a lowercase domain (e.g. you.example.com).
